marinmc.mod.fps.name: FPS Counter
marinmc.mod.fps.desc: Displays your frames per second on screen.
marinmc.mod.cps.name: CPS Counter
marinmc.mod.keystrokes.name: Keystrokes
marinmc.mod.keystrokes.desc: Displays your movement (WASD) and mouse keys.
marinmc.mod.armor.name: Armor Status
marinmc.mod.armor.desc: Displays durability of equipped armor and held items.
marinmc.mod.compass.name: Direction HUD
marinmc.mod.compass.desc: Shows the direction you are facing on screen.
marinmc.mod.coords.name: Coordinates
marinmc.mod.coords.desc: Displays your current X, Y, Z coordinates.
marinmc.mod.ping.name: Ping Counter
marinmc.mod.ping.desc: Shows your connection latency to the server in ms.
marinmc.mod.speed.name: Speedometer
marinmc.mod.speed.desc: Displays your movement speed in m/s.
marinmc.mod.replay.name: Recording Indicator
marinmc.mod.replay.desc: Toggle recording with F10; shows elapsed time and REC dot.
marinmc.mod.potion_status.name: Potion Status
marinmc.mod.potion_status.desc: Displays active potion effects and duration.
marinmc.mod.crosshair.name: Custom Crosshair
marinmc.mod.crosshair.desc: Draws a customizable crosshair on screen.
marinmc.mod.toggle_sneak.name: Toggle Sneak
marinmc.mod.toggle_sneak.desc: Allows toggling sneak and sprint key bindings.
marinmc.mod.zoom.name: Zoom
marinmc.mod.zoom.desc: Allows zooming in by pressing the C key.
marinmc.mod.visuals_1_7.name: 1.7 Visuals
marinmc.mod.visuals_1_7.desc: Applies 1.7 hit damage animations and mechanics.
marinmc.mod.block_outline.name: Block Outline
marinmc.mod.block_outline.desc: Customizes the outline of the block you look at.
marinmc.mod.item_physics.name: Item Physics
marinmc.mod.item_physics.desc: Adds realistic 3D physics to dropped items.
marinmc.mod.freelook.name: Freelook
marinmc.mod.freelook.desc: Look around without changing your movement direction.
marinmc.mod.fullbright.name: Fullbright
marinmc.mod.fullbright.desc: Fully brightens up dark places and caves.
marinmc.mod.tnt_radius.name: TNT Radius
marinmc.mod.tnt_radius.desc: Displays explosion radius of primed TNTs.
marinmc.menu.hud_editor_desc: Left click & drag to move. Right click to customize. Press ESC to exit.
marinmc.waypoint.name: Name:
marinmc.mod.time_display.name: Time Display
marinmc.mod.time_display.desc: Shows real-world time and Minecraft day cycle on screen.
marinmc.mod.server_info.name: Server Info
marinmc.mod.server_info.desc: Displays current server address or singleplayer status.
marinmc.mod.item_counter.name: Item Counter
marinmc.mod.item_counter.desc: Shows count of held item across your inventory.
marinmc.mod.hit_indicator.name: Hit Indicator
marinmc.mod.hit_indicator.desc: Directional damage indicator arrows when you get hit.
marinmc.mod.damage_indicator.name: Damage Indicator
marinmc.mod.damage_indicator.desc: Shows damage indicator mod status card.
marinmc.mod.saturation_display.name: Saturation Display
marinmc.mod.saturation_display.desc: Displays your saturation level with a progress bar.
marinmc.mod.light_level.name: Light Level
marinmc.mod.light_level.desc: Shows block and sky light levels at your position.
marinmc.mod.chat_macros.name: Chat Macros
marinmc.mod.chat_macros.desc: Quick chat message shortcuts with F-keys.
marinmc.mod.memory_usage.name: Memory Usage
marinmc.mod.memory_usage.desc: Displays current used and allocated RAM on screen.
